label: 第252話
source_locator: 単行本28巻 目次 p.130
summary_short: 伏黒は生きる意志を失っており、救出は失敗する。宿儺は世界を断つ斬撃で乙骨を倒すが、領域崩壊の瞬間に真希が奇襲し、釈魂刀で宿儺の心臓を貫く。
summary_full: 伏黒は生きる意志を失っており、救出は失敗する。宿儺は世界を断つ斬撃で乙骨を倒すが、領域崩壊の瞬間に真希が奇襲し、釈魂刀で宿儺の心臓を貫く。救出に失敗した隙に宿儺は条件を整えて世界を断つ斬撃を放ち、乙骨を致命傷にする。領域崩壊と同時に真希が気配なく侵入し、釈魂刀で心臓を貫く。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Despite having failed to rescue 恵 , 悠仁 and 憂太 still have a backup plan. They give 真希 the opening to strike, and her attack continues the downward spiral of 宿儺's power. However, the King of Curses still has yet to go all out.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 真希 readies herself to enter the fight. While 乙骨憂太 and 虎杖悠仁 battle 両面宿儺 within 憂太’s 領域展開 , 真贋相愛 , 日下部篤也 and 猪野琢真 remain outside the barrier . 日下部 praises 憂太 for repositioning the domain's coordinates before outlining the operation to 猪野: all available sorcerers will disperse to eliminate blind spots, while 禪院真希 will launch a surprise attack once 憂太 deliberately damages the domain barrier as the signal. 猪野 suggests sending additional fighters into the domain, but 日下部 rejects the idea, stating that doing so would alert 宿儺 and compromise 真希’s ambush. 真希 arrives on the battlefield, shifting into a sprinting position as she waits for the signal. 憂太 shatters his domain’s barrier, prompting 宿儺 to lower his guard. Anticipating this outcome, 日下部 remarks that the situation represents both the sorcerers' best- and worst-case scenario. With 宿儺 distracted by 真希's sudden attack, a distraught 里香 retrieves 憂太's unconscious body and delivers him to 憂憂 , who teleports him out of the battlefield. After creating distance from 真希, 宿儺 deduces that 憂太 intentionally destroyed the barrier to serve as a diversion for the heavenly restricted sorcerer. He further speculates that 真希's lack of 呪力 allowed her to pass through the barrier undetected, while her cursed tool had been planted inside the domain beforehand. 宿儺 then observes that the wound inflicted by 真希's 釈魂刀 is regenerating far more slowly than his other injuries. It is revealed that wounds dealt by the 釈魂刀 cannot ordinarily be healed with 反転術式 when wielded by someone capable of perceiving the soul, as restoring such damage requires precise understanding of the soul's form. Although 宿儺 possesses awareness of his own soul due to inhabiting a body with two souls, the lingering effects of his battle with 五条悟 prevents him from effectively repairing the damage. 真希 physically overpowers 宿儺. 悠仁 rushes back into the fight in an attempt to save 恵 , but suddenly collapses and coughs up blood. Realizing that he failed to fully heal part of his body after sustaining four fatal injuries, 悠仁 desperately searches for the source of the damage. 脹相 appears next to him and reassures his younger brother, instructing him to heal himself by visualizing his body being shaped through his blood vessels. Meanwhile, 真希 and 宿儺 clash across the streets of 新宿, with 真希 eventually hurling 宿儺 into a bridge. 宿儺 slices the structure apart with his 術式 and drops the debris onto 真希 to distract her, using the opportunity to quietly chant the incantation for 解 . As she evades the falling rubble, 真希 hears the chant and narrowly dodges the enhanced flying slash. "I can see that lord 宿儺 still isn't taking this fight seriously." 宿儺 notes that 真希 is able to perceive his technique more clearly than most sorcerers, likening her awareness to 魔虚羅 's during the 渋谷事変 . 真希 notices that 宿儺 is forcibly circulating 呪力 to keep his damaged heart beating while healing himself. She taunts him over his deteriorated condition, but 宿儺 dismisses her concern, stating that the situation poses little trouble. Elsewhere in a frost-covered area of 新宿, 秤金次 continues his fight with 裏梅 . 秤 expresses confidence that his allies will defeat 宿儺, noting that the King of Curses' 呪力 output is rapidly declining. 裏梅 scoffs at 秤's optimism, asserting that 宿儺's 呪力 only fluctuates when he loses interest in his opponents. They chastise 秤 for failing to present a worthy challenger after 五条, stating that 宿儺 has yet to fight seriously.

candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 新宿 新宿
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪具 釈魂刀 宿儺の術式 反転術式 術式 御廚子 捌／解 捌／解 憂憂の術式 Teleportation* 裏梅の術式 氷凝呪法 乙骨憂太の術式 模倣 領域展開：真贋相愛 里香 虎杖悠仁の術式 反転術式 術式

key_events_verified_phase11: 伏黒は生きる意志を失っており、救出は失敗する。
宿儺は世界を断つ斬撃で乙骨を倒すが、領域崩壊の瞬間に真希が奇襲し、釈魂刀で宿儺の心臓を貫く。
救出に失敗した隙に宿儺は条件を整えて世界を断つ斬撃を放ち、乙骨を致命傷にする。
領域崩壊と同時に真希が気配なく侵入し、釈魂刀で心臓を貫く。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
